rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>相比其他洞窟，<unk[5:0]>
此地尤为阴暗。

您身上带好<Color=red>光亮花的种子<Color=white>了吗？

<unk[3:0:7]>這裡與其他洞窟相比，<unk[5:0]>

如果想前往前方的採礦場，就必須準備好照明。<unk[5:0]>
您有好好帶上<Color=red>光亮花的種子<Color=white>嗎？

<unk[3:0:7]>ここは <Ruby={2:4}ほか>他の<Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟に<Ruby={2:4}くら>比べても<unk[5:0]>

<Color=red>アカリバナの<Ruby={2:4}たね>種 <Color=white>きちんとお<Ruby={2:2}も>持ちでしょうか？

<unk[3:0:7]>This cave is especially dark.<PageBreak>You will need a light in order to proceed
to the mining site ahead. <unk[5:0]>Do you have any
<Color=red>brightbloom seeds<Color=white>?

rows.TWzh: <unk[3:0:7]>啊，看來您不知道那是什麼東西。<unk[5:0]>

rows.USen: <unk[3:0:7]>Ah. You do not know of them.<unk[5:0]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>那边正在发着光的花朵就是<Color=red>光亮花<Color=white>。<unk[5:0]>

如您所见，它具有<Color=red>发出强烈光芒<Color=white>的性质，<unk[5:0]>
因此可以在这样的黑暗处用作照明。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>在那處散發著光芒的花，就是<Color=red>光亮花<Color=white>。<unk[5:0]>

如您所見，這種花具有<Color=red>發出強烈光芒<Color=white>的性質。<unk[5:0]>
因此在這種昏暗處能夠發揮照明的效果。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]>そこで<Ruby={2:4}ひか>光っている<Ruby={2:4}はな>花が <Color=red>アカリバナ<Color=white>です<unk[5:0]>

<Ruby={2:2}み>見ての<Ruby={2:4}とお>通り <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}つよ>強く<Ruby={2:4}ひか>光り<Ruby={2:6}かがや>輝く<Color=white><Ruby={4:8}せいしつ>性質があるため<unk[5:0]>
こうした<Ruby={4:8}あんしょ>暗所では <Ruby={2:2}あ>明かりとして<Ruby={4:6}やくだ>役立つのです
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>The glowing flowers there are
<Color=red>brightblooms<Color=white>.<unk[5:0]><PageBreak>They <Color=red>shine very brightly<Color=white>. <unk[5:0]>Many use them
as illumination in dark places.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>这种光亮花<unk[5:0]>
大多生长于这种<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>中……
这座洞窟里的光亮花<unk[5:0]>
几乎都被在此作业的我等同胞摘走了。
因此我在这里提醒向洞窟内前进的人<unk[5:0]>
记得随身携带<Color=red>光亮花的种子<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:7]>对了，<unk[5:0]>还要提醒一下，
这种<Color=red>光亮花<Color=white><unk[5:0]>是不会自己开花的。
用剑敲击<Color=red>光亮花的种子<Color=white>，<unk[5:0]>
或是用箭把它射出去，<unk[5:0]>种子就会因受到<Color=red>冲击<Color=white>开花。
长在那边的<Color=red>光亮花<Color=white>
便是由我令它开花的。
<unk[3:0:7]>若您想继续深入，<unk[5:0]>
也请务必使用<Color=red>光亮花的种子<Color=white>。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>這種<Color=red>光亮花<Color=white>，<unk[5:0]>
主要都生長在這類<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>……
不過我們那些執勤的同胞，<unk[5:0]>
把這個洞窟裡的花幾乎都摘光了。
因此我才會在此提醒要前往的人，<unk[5:0]>
記得攜帶<Color=red>光亮花的種子<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:7]>啊，<unk[5:0]>順帶一提，<unk[5:0]>
這些<Color=red>光亮花<Color=white>並不會自己開花。
要用劍敲擊<Color=red>光亮花的種子<Color=white>，<unk[5:0]>
或是綁在箭上射出，<unk[5:0]>造成<Color=red>衝擊<Color=white>才會綻放。
長在那邊的<Color=red>光亮花<Color=white>，
就是我令其綻放的。
如果您要繼續前進的話，<unk[5:0]>
也請務必帶上<Color=red>光亮花的種子<Color=white>。

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>この アカリバナ<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}おも>主に ここのような<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟<Color=white>に<Ruby={4:6}じせい>自生していますが…
この<Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟では<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={4:8}さぎょう>作業に<Ruby={2:2}あ>当たっていた<Ruby={2:4}われ>我らの<Ruby={4:8}どうほう>同胞が

<Color=red>アカリバナの<Ruby={2:4}たね>種<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:8}けいこう>携行を<Ruby={8:14}ちゅういかんき>注意喚起しているのです
<unk[3:0:7]>あ<unk[5:0]> ちなみにこの <Color=red>アカリバナ<Color=white>は<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:6}しぜん>自然に<Ruby={4:6}かいか>開花することはありません
その<Ruby={2:4}たね>種である<Color=red>アカリバナの<Ruby={2:4}たね>種<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}けん>剣で<Ruby={2:4}たた>叩いたり<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:2}や>矢につけて<Ruby={2:4}はな>放つと<unk[5:0]> その<Color=red><Ruby={4:10}しょうげき>衝撃<Color=white>で<Ruby={4:6}かいか>開花するのです
そこに<Ruby={2:2}は>生えている<Color=red>アカリバナ<Color=white>も
<Ruby={2:8}わたくし>私が<Ruby={4:6}かいか>開花させたものでございます
<unk[3:0:7]>あなた<Ruby={2:4}さま>様も この<Ruby={2:4}さき>先に<Ruby={2:2}い>行くのであれば<unk[5:0]>
<Color=red>アカリバナの<Ruby={2:4}たね>種<Color=white>を お<Ruby={2:4}つか>使いください
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>These <Color=red>brightblooms<Color=white><unk[5:0]> grow natively in <Color=red>caves<Color=white>
such as this one.<PageBreak>This cave has been picked mostly clean of
them. That is because it is especially dark.
The seeds were often necessary.<PageBreak>I am posted here to provide a reminder to
bring <Color=red>brightbloom seeds<Color=white>.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:7]>By the way. <unk[5:0]>Did you know <Color=red>brightblooms<Color=white>
require a stimulus to blossom?<PageBreak>Striking a <Color=red>brightbloom seed<Color=white> or attaching
it to an arrow will cause it to activate
on <Color=red>impact<Color=white>.<PageBreak>The <Color=red>brightbloom<Color=white> you see growing there<unk[5:0]>
is no different. I caused it to blossom.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:7]>It will generally be in your best interest to
use <Color=red>brightbloom seeds <Color=white>in dark places
such as this.

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>那我就放心了。<unk[5:0]>

rows.USen:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:263]>Brightbloom seeds<Color=white> grow primarily in
caves. <unk[5:0]>There was a time once when they
grew here as well.<PageBreak>This cave has been mostly picked clean of

<Color=red>brightbloom seeds<Color=white>. <unk[5:0]>I am posted here

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>That is excellent. <unk[5:1]>A light will be necessary
in order to see anything past here.<PageBreak><Color=red>Brightbloom seeds<Color=white> grow primarily in
<Color=red>caves<Color=white>. <unk[5:0]>There was a time once when they
grew here as well.<PageBreak>But this cave is largely empty of the seeds
by now. <unk[5:0]>My associates took most of them
due to their pressing needs.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:7]>Do not forget to bring some if you intend
to venture inside.
